text:
Once upon a time, a dog named Sparkles went on an adventure.

Sparkles lived a quiet life, chasing squirrels and loving cookies.

One day, she saw a rainbow. Sparkles ran to greet it!

After a long walk, a friendly unicorn named Whiskers joined her.

They spent days exploring, and Sparkles learned all about magic.

One morning, they found a treasure chest!

But the unicorn said it belonged to a kind-hearted giant.

They promised to share everything. Whiskers waved goodbye and flew off into the sunset.

Sparkles learned that some treasures aren't always about jewels.

Sometimes they're about friendship. Goodbye, Whiskers!

Back at home, Sparkles happily fed the squirrels.
